LanguageData.Ammo_57mmRocket_HE.label: 57mm rocket (HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_57mmRocket_HE.description: An unguided rocket equipped with an explosive warhead and a contact fuse.

LanguageData.Ammo_57mmRocket_HEAT.description: An unguided rocket equipped with an explosive warhead and a contact fuse.
LanguageData.Ammo_57mmRocket_Thermobaric.label: 57mm rocket (Thermobaric)
LanguageData.Ammo_57mmRocket_Thermobaric.description: An unguided rocket equipped with an explosive warhead and a contact fuse.

LanguageData.Bullet_57mmRocket_HEAT.label: 57mm Rocket (HEAT)
